name: Three-Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 medium onion, peeled, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a shallow baking dish that holds about 2 1/2 to 3 quarts (I use a 9 x 13 x 2 inch Pyrex dish). It should be able to go both in the oven and under the broiler.
2. Layer half the potatoes, sprinkling with salt and pepper; dot with butter.
3. Layer half the onion, sprinkling each layer with salt and pepper and dotting with butter.
4. Layer half the squash, repeating the process above.
5. Repeat each stratum, ending with squash.
6. Cover tightly and bake in a preheated 350-degree oven until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork (about 1 hour and 45 minutes).
7. Stir together the parmesan cheese and sour cream.
8. Spread the mixture over the top of the vegetables.
9. Broil, watching carefully, about 6 to 8 inches from the heat, until the topping is browned in spots (3 to 5 minutes).
10. Serve at once.
